saveframes.name: entry_information_1
tags: Partial solid-state NMR 13C, 15N resonance assignments of the two conformations of Bj-SemiSWEET in native celular membranes

This entry presents the partial solid-state NMR 13C and 15N resonance assignments 
of two conformations of the sugar transporter protein, Sugar will eventually be 
exported transporter from Bradyrhizobium (Bj-SemiSWEET), in native cellular membranes.

saveframes.name: citations_1
tags: Membrane Protein Structures in Native Cellular Membranes Revealed by Solid-State NMR Spectroscopy

data: One monomer of the symmetric dimer
One monomer of the symmetric dimer
The Bradyrhizobium japonicum SemiSWEET mediates sucrose transport.
The SemiSWEET protein from Bradyrhizobium japonicum functions as a mediator of sucrose transport.

saveframes.name: sample_1
tags:
The cellular membranes BJSS_IM for ssNMR experiments were collected directly 
after overexpression of Bj-SemiSWEET in E.coli, cell lysis, and isolation of 
cell components without protein purification.

saveframes.name: experiment_list_1
tags:
All NMR experiments were performed on a standard Bruker Advance 800 MHz spectrometer 
with a 3.2 mm E-free HCN MAS probe under 10.5 kHz spinning rate at 272 K. 
The 2D/3D ssNMR CONCA, NCOCX, and NCACX experiments of U-13C, 15N-BJSS IM samples 
were performed for chemical shift assignments.

saveframes.name: chem_shift_reference_1
tags:
The 13C chemical shifts were referenced using adamantine (40.48 ppm for the methylene carbon),
(Morcombe and Zilm 2003) and 15N chemical shifts were indirectly referenced using liquid NH3 
according to gyromagnetic ratios.

saveframes.name: assigned_chemical_shifts_1
tags: Chemical shifts observed in the outward-open conformation of Bj-SemiSWEET

saveframes.name: assigned_chemical_shifts_2
tags: Chemical shifts observed in the occluded conformation of Bj-SemiSWEET
